name: Branches Game
description: Branches Game is a fun and addictive casual game that tests your timing, focus, and reflex skills. In this game, your goal is to move forward while avoiding dangerous branches in your path. One wrong move can end the game, so you must stay alert and react quickly. The gameplay is simple and easy to understand, making it perfect for players of all ages. With smooth controls and clean visuals, Branches Game offers a relaxing yet challenging experience. As you progress, the speed increases, making the game more exciting and challenging.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
